summary: Sprint Planner module tested. Backend: 7/7 tests pass. Frontend: Sprint page loads, Kanban board works, AI generation form works, Add Task modal works, nav/dashboard integration works.
action_items: Clean up leftover TEST_ tasks in sprint_tasks collection (from backend testing - TEST_Build login feature, TEST_Task for CRUD) - use GET /api/tasks and DELETE to clean up
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is now 654 lines - approaching limit, consider splitting sprint_planner routes into separate file

PUT /api/tasks/:id task update re-fetch does not verify user_id ownership: `t = await db.sprint_tasks.find_one({'id': task_id})` (line 535) - missing user_id filter on re-fetch after update (minor security concern - doesn't expose data but could return another user's task if same custom id collision)
seed_data_creation: Backend tests created and cleaned up TEST_ tasks. One residual TEST_Build login feature task may remain in DB.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sprint Planner fully tested and working. Backend CRUD (GET/POST/PUT/DELETE /api/tasks) all pass. AI generation via POST /api/ai/sprint takes ~60s but returns valid tasks. Frontend: Kanban board (4 columns), AI form panel (textarea + sliders + duration select), Add Task modal (data-testid='task-title-input'), sprint tabs, progress bar all working. Drag-and-drop uses HTML5 drag API - not automated tested but implementation looks correct in code. A residual TEST_ task may be in DB from backend tests.
features_verified: Sprint page /sprint loads with Kanban board ✓
Sprint nav link in Navbar highlighted ✓
Dashboard AI Sprint Planner card visible ✓
Generate with AI button toggles form panel ✓
AI form has: textarea, team size slider, sprints slider, duration select, submit ✓
Add Task modal with title/desc/priority/type/story points/sprint inputs ✓
Sprint tabs (All Sprints, Sprint N) visible ✓
4 Kanban columns: Backlog, In Progress, In Review, Done ✓
